subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team.

We’d be glad to set up an introductory call next week. The following time windows work on our side:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which of these works best for you, and we’ll send over a calendar invite with call details.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we’re not able to share internal contact information. For any public contact options or leadership information, please refer to the contact and leadership sections on our company website.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Team]
